# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to production
        uses: actions/deploy-to-production@v1
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_TOKEN }}

  prevent-missing-vulnerability-scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run vulnerability scan
        run: npm audit

      - name: Fail if vulnerabilities found
        if: ${{ steps.audit.outputs.has-vulnerabilities }}
        run: exit 1

  prevent-missing-vulnerability-scan-report:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run vulnerability scan
        run: npm audit

      - name: Generate report
        run: npm audit report

      - name: Fail if vulnerabilities found
        if: ${{ steps.audit.outputs.has-vulnerabilities }}
        run: exit 1
